{{Stub}}

== Official Modding ==

The official compile-time modding API has not been finished, you can watch its progress in [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/issues/1528 #1528] and see the initial discussions in [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/issues/1507 #1507]

== Unofficial Modding ==

Some forks of Cubyz with custom modding support exist, they can be found at these links:

* [https://addons.ashframe.net/addon.html?id=24 Web Assembly (wasm) modding] (~latest 0.1.0-dev)
* [https://github.com/KewaiiGamer/ElevatorMod-Cubyz/tree/main Compile time modding] (Somewhat outdated, post-0.0.0)
* [https://github.com/LinaPlusPlus/Cubyz/tree/integrate_lua Cubyz lua integration] (Very outdated, pre-0.0.0)
